name: Death Tracker
description: Tracks your deaths at every percentage

issues.info: Feel free to send eny issues on the "feedback" channel on the discord server!

session-method.name: Session Method
session-method.description:
Determines when a session should end.
<cy>Exit level</c> - Ends when exiting the level.
<cy>Exit Game</c> - Ends when exiting the game.
<cy>Exit Game</c> - End after a set amount of seconds pass (Session Length).

late-save.name: Late Save
late-save.description: Will save your deaths when exiting the level instead of when you die, this may fix lag spikes that happen on death.

safe-mode-v3.name: Safe Mode
safe-mode-v3.description: Will prevent ANY form of death tracking

cheat-detect.name: Cheat Detection
cheat-detect.description: Will prevent deaths from tracking when using noclip or speedhack (mostly accurate)

disable-tracking-completed-levels.name: Disable Tracking Completed Levels
disable-tracking-completed-levels.description: Disables tracking on completed online levels.

backups-unlimited.name: Unlimited Backups
backups-unlimited.description: Remove/Add the limit for how many of the most recent backups should be saved

backups-max-amount.name: Max Auto Backups
backups-max-amount.description: The limit of how many backups will be saved before old ones are deleted

auto-backups-enabled.name: Auto Backups Enabled
auto-backups-enabled.description: Enable/Disable auto backups on all levels

auto-backups-general.name: Auto Backup General
auto-backups-general.description: Whether to backup the general (not session) data when creating a backup automatically

auto-backups-sessions-all.name: Auto Backup All Sessions
auto-backups-sessions-all.description: Whether to backup all sessions of a level when creating a backup automatically. if diabled you can set the specific amount of sessions you wanna save in the "Backup Sessions Amount" setting

auto-backups-sessions-amount.name: Auto Backup Sessions Amount
auto-backups-sessions-amount.description: How many of the most recent sessions should be saved in a automatically created backup

auto-backup-at-lvl-exit.name: Auto Backup at level exit
auto-backup-at-lvl-exit.description: Create a backup whenever exiting a level

auto-backup-at-dt-exit.name: Auto Backup at death tracker menu exit
auto-backup-at-dt-exit.description: Create a backup whenever exiting the death tracker menu

check-for-old.name: Convert old saves
check-for-old.description: This is used to convert old saves from death tracker V2 to V3

pause-menu.name: Pause Menu Button
pause-menu.description: Adds the tracker button to the pause menu.

complete-menu.name: Complete Menu Button
complete-menu.description: Adds the tracker button to the level complete screen.

enter-new-line.name: Enter new line
enter-new-line.description: Enters a new line when editing a labels text

enter-new-run-per.name: Enter new run percentage
enter-new-run-per.description: Enters a new run percent when inputting for adding a new percent to your "runs to track"

add-deaths.name: Add deaths
add-deaths.description: Adds deaths while you input a percent to change deaths to your level

remove-deaths.name: Remove deaths
remove-deaths.description: Removes deaths while you input a percent to change deaths to your level
